title: deer-flow.research.finding v1
description: A significant evidence item gathered during research stages of a stack-tuner cycle. Emitted mid-cycle to enable live streaming of findings to Android Research card UIs. Compact form (source=/deer-flow) includes only cycle_id+stage+finding_type; full form (source=/deer-flow/stack-tuner) adds model, excerpt, source_url, and confidence.

stage.description: stage name within the cycle (e.g. research_v1, evidence_v1)

model.description: model id that produced or gathered this finding (full form only)

finding_type.description: category of finding (e.g. doc_reference, code_snippet, benchmark_result, api_contract, heuristic)

excerpt.description: relevant text or data snippet from the finding source

source_url.description: URL or path to the source document or data

confidence.description: confidence score for this finding's relevance or accuracy
